description_long: This is a single gray slip-on house slipper with a minimalist design, featuring a soft felt-like upper material and a low-profile, flat sole. The slipper has a closed toe and an open heel, making it easy to slide on and off. The upper is seamless and smooth, with a subtle central seam running from the toe to the instep. A small black fabric tag with a white cross is attached near the heel on the outer side, adding a touch of branding. The sole appears to be made of a thin, light brown rubber or synthetic material, providing basic grip and comfort for indoor use. The interior is lined with the same soft material as the exterior, ensuring a cozy fit.
description: A gray slip-on house slipper with a soft felt upper, open heel, and thin brown sole, featuring a small black tag with a white cross near the heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the closed, rounded toe and central seam of the gray slipper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the slipper's low profile, open heel, and seamless felt upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open heel, interior lining, and a small black tag with a white cross on the outer side.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the slipper's smooth, continuous upper and the thin brown sole.
attribute_logo: small black tag with a white cross on the outer side near the heel
